title: Opening for Store Manager at La Opala Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at La Opala Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
La Opala Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About La Opala Digital Technologies:
La Opala Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala Digital Technologies!
